name: Steve Chabot
subject: Trump’s Republican Rivals
body:
Trump's Republican Rivals No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Trump's Republican Rivals](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-j/)
An overwhelming majority of Republicans support Donald Trump's reelection to the presidency. But not all. I'm on the blog today talking about President Trump's Republican rivals and what I think their chances may be.

Click the link below to read this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [My Prediction - The Democrat Nominee for President Will Be...](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-d/)
So who's going to be Donald Trump's Democratic rival for the presidency this time around? The truth is, no one knows for sure. And Joe Biden has been the leader of the Democrat pack since even before he officially threw his hat into the ring back in April. But I think it's likely to be someone other than Joe. Here's my analysis.

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A "Beautiful" Letter](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-u/)
President Trump announced a few days ago that he'd received another letter from North Korea's dictator Kim Jong Un. Not only was it a letter, but it was a "beautiful" letter.

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [El Paso and Dayton](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-n/)
Well, it's happened again. Twice. Crazy/evil men with guns, killing and wounding innocent people, just for the hell of it. This time in El Paso, Texas. And just up the road from our community, in Dayton.

Click the link below to read my thoughts in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdpuukl-kujkulhluu-f/)

subject: Marc's 40th Birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Marc Flores for Congress
body:
** Dear Peter,
------------------------------------------------------------
Today is Marc's birthday, and he is celebrating by attending a flood control meeting, block walking in Ponderosa Forest, Pleasantville, and Riverside Terrace, and attending a TxDot I-45 Community Meeting.

Marc is and remains committed to hearing from you, his neighbors, friends and family, and seeing how we can help improve your lives. Our efforts are unwavering, our passion, uncompromisable.

Marc on 1230 AM - The Source, discussing his issues.

Block walking rain or shine! We want to hear from you.

Sunnyside Parade with Marc, John and Lowell.

To help us celebrate, we ask that you donate $20 (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6fadb0b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_08_28_01_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6fadb0b8a7-32267927) . Your money helps to put gas in our tank, and print out fliers, so we can reach more people with Marc's message.
Donate today! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6fadb0b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_08_28_01_36&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6fadb0b8a7-32267927)
Thank you for helping me build a better district. We truly can do better, together!

Marc Flores

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Join Presidential Candidate, Joe Sestak, in New York City on Thursday, September 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Jacob Worenklein, CEO, US Grid Company
Cordially invites you to a Fundraiser Reception on Thursday, September 5, to support
Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak

Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line [https://iowastartingline.com/2019/07/29/the-peculiar-surprisingly-effective-campaign-of-joe-sestak/] wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and “has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’” The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....”

Vox called Joe [https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/2019/8/13/20680106/joe-sestak-2020-presidential-campaign-policies-admiral-navy-specter-obama-medicare-public-option] a “maverick” and “an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it.” National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.

Joe aims to build a coalition that brings together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Joe is an experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years , including in the White House as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly 2-to-1 Republican district where he was reelected without spending a dime on campaign ads .

An independent-minded public servant, Joe refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary.

Please come to hear why Joe inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and Plan for America . Check out JoeSestak.com

Thursday, September 5th from 6:00 p.m. - 7:30 p.m.
at US Grid Company (USGRDCO)
1177 Avenue of the Americas - 5th Floor
New York, NY 10036
[between 45th and 46th Streets]
Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250

clean_body: Jacob Worenklein, CEO, US Grid Company Cordially invites you to a Fundraiser Reception on Thursday, September 5, to support Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line [] wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and “has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’” The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [] said, “[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....” Vox called Joe [] a “maverick” and “an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it.” National Review called him [] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race. Joe aims to build a coalition that brings together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges. Joe is an experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years , including in the White House as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly 2-to-1 Republican district where he was reelected without spending a dime on campaign ads . An independent-minded public servant, Joe refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary. Please come to hear why Joe inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and Plan for America . Check out JoeSestak.com Thursday, September 5th from 6:00 p.m. - 7:30 p.m. at US Grid Company (USGRDCO) 1177 Avenue of the Americas - 5th Floor New York, NY 10036 [between 45th and 46th Streets] Requested Contribution Levels: Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000 Supporter: $500 Friend: $250 To RSVP or contribute for this event, click here [] You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302. Questions: Email reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051 Paid for by Joe Sestak for President Joe Sestak for President P.O Box 17246 Alexandria, VA 22302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

I’ll cut right to the point - right now we need your help.

**Trump has hijacked our Democracy – fueling hate and corruption with lies and deceit.** The GOP is out of control – [headlines like this are an embarrassment. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9468470/93533639/1078576350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDEyMjkyMC02N2NhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6ZsFUgEM_WU5GeK--QjPHy_Pxt2wvhdYwDGVLMDRY4s=)

So, what’s the difference between a Democrat-led Senate and a Republican-led Senate?
---
I know this sounds like the set up to a bad joke, but trust me, the answer definitely isn’t funny. The answer is an _irresponsible state budget that raises taxes, kills jobs and increases spending to unsustainable levels._ Trust me, the tax bill that they want to stick you with is no laughing matter. Here’s another bad joke for you: What do you call an inanimate object, mightier than a sword and more fiscally responsible than your average Democrat? Governor Chris Sununu’s veto pen! Help us take back the Senate and let the Democrats know that the state budget is not a joke!

name: Adam Hattersley
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
I can’t believe we’re officially one month into this campaign. The time has totally flown by and I’m so proud of the work we’ve done.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9471378/93556299/33231869?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmUyZjcwOC03NWNhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9pOwW2KsvNOl40G91Q5ayMbqQG0DWQnOLOeIjzfMMw=&refcode=Em_fr_2019.08.29_b1_ah_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1)
---
| Hi Peter,

I can’t believe we’re officially one month into this campaign. The time has totally flown by and I’m so proud of the work we’ve done.

I’ll be honest, Peter. Launching a campaign for Congress is scary. I may be a big tough military guy (haha), but I’m not ashamed to admit that I get scared.

You see, there’s a lot on the line for Floridians this election. Families are worried about making ends meet and just getting through the day-to-day.

I want to do all that I can to not let them down -- to be the candidate that they feel excited to vote for and to go all the way in flipping our district blue. It’s a big undertaking, but it’s one I feel completely committed to. **We can’t afford anything less.**

So tonight, our campaign set a big goal of reaching 200 grassroots supporters in the first month since our launch. Right now we’re 26 donors away from hitting the mark and I know we can get there with your support.

Here’s the link to donate to our goal. Thank you for joining us on this journey.

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q32019**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9471379/93556300/33231869?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmUyZjcwOC03NWNhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9pOwW2KsvNOl40G91Q5ayMbqQG0DWQnOLOeIjzfMMw=&refcode=Em_fr_2019.08.29_b1_ah_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1)

-Adam | _Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District._

[**Can we count on you to contribute a few dollars to Adam's campaign? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9471380/93556301/33231869?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmUyZjcwOC03NWNhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9pOwW2KsvNOl40G91Q5ayMbqQG0DWQnOLOeIjzfMMw=&refcode=Em_fr_2019.08.29_b1_ah_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9471381/93556302/33231869?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmUyZjcwOC03NWNhLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9pOwW2KsvNOl40G91Q5ayMbqQG0DWQnOLOeIjzfMMw=&refcode=Em_fr_2019.08.29_b1_ah_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1)

The August fundraising deadline is a few short days away, everyone, and our numbers are starting to drag.
This matters because Trump was in New Hampshire rallying support for Republicans earlier this month, and Senator Hassan only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes.
New Hampshire campaigns always come down to the wire, and every dollar we raise could mean protecting this seat or turning it over to the GOP. That's why we have to ask:
[**Please give $3 or more to stop Donald Trump and Republicans from buying this seat. This matters because Trump was in New Hampshire rallying support for Republicans earlier this month, and Senator Hassan only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes. New Hampshire campaigns always come down to the wire, and every dollar we raise could mean protecting this seat or turning it over to the GOP. That's why we have to ask: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" The amount we raise will give Trump a clear message about the strength of our campaign and with his increased focused on the Granite State, we can't afford to fall short. Time is running out so we really appreciate you jumping in. -- Team Maggie ""

name: Kandi, Team Hood
subject: Let's finish strong
body:
|

We've been working hard throughout the summer to put Jim in a position to win this fall.
Friend,

We've been working hard throughout the summer to put Jim in a position to win this fall. Now we know who he is up against and what it's going to take to win. A group of our supporters see that we have an opponent we can beat, and have agreed to **MATCH every dollar raised online for the rest of the month. Can you chip in right now to help us get a leg up on the opposition?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/_J_74wUUH5-vUOQnc83pND3NXqw3ts9rr1ZHqbSk1OU=/38q3cjZX1ibxBy41YLBexzA06Vn7X_6phTxH4BSDXuA=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd&amount=5)**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/_J_74wUUH5-vUOQnc83pND3NXqw3ts9rr1ZHqbSk1OU=/38q3cjZX1ibxBy41YLBexzA06Vn7X_6phTxH4BSDXuA=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd&amount=10)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/_J_74wUUH5-vUOQnc83pND3NXqw3ts9rr1ZHqbSk1OU=/38q3cjZX1ibxBy41YLBexzA06Vn7X_6phTxH4BSDXuA=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd&amount=25)**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/_J_74wUUH5-vUOQnc83pND3NXqw3ts9rr1ZHqbSk1OU=/38q3cjZX1ibxBy41YLBexzA06Vn7X_6phTxH4BSDXuA=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd&amount=50)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/_J_74wUUH5-vUOQnc83pND3NXqw3ts9rr1ZHqbSk1OU=/38q3cjZX1ibxBy41YLBexzA06Vn7X_6phTxH4BSDXuA=?refcode=20190829nd)**
This is our first end-of-month deadline since Tate Reeves officially became our opponent, and it's crucial that we blow our August goal out of the water. Every dollar that we get now is going to have a tremendous impact on our ability to spread our message -- at the doors, on the airwaves, and in mailboxes across the state.

Jim won't be able to reach the governor's office without your support. This race is going to come down to the wire, and Mississippi's future hangs in the balance. With Jim, Mississippi moves forward -- but with Tate, we're stuck in the past.

**[Every dollar we receive between now and the end of the month will be MATCHED. Can we count on you to contribute whatever you can today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/_J_74wUUH5-vUOQnc83pND3NXqw3ts9rr1ZHqbSk1OU=/38q3cjZX1ibxBy41YLBexzA06Vn7X_6phTxH4BSDXuA=?refcode=20190829nd&amount=10)**

Thanks,

Kandi, Team Hood

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: August (summary)
body:
First...Next...Then...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de9/4bef7a87/6834ef1d/287f15df/1575426691/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

August was an exciting month for our campaign.
Here's a quick reminder of what went down:
**FIRST:**_Cook Political Report_ moved our race from "leans Republican" to "toss-up" after just 8 weeks on the campaign trail!
**NEXT:** Maine's openly racist former Republican Governor Paul LePage endorsed Susan Collins.
**NOW:** We're up against a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline and asking for your help.
[**Make a $3 donation before our end-of-month deadline this Saturday at midnight. Help us finish August even stronger than we started.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de9/4bef7a87/6834ef1d/287f15de/1575426691/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190829-full")
Ours will be among the closest Senate races in the country. Everyone - including Mitch McConnell and national Republican donors - is watching to see if we have what it takes to defeat Susan Collins.
The answer is yes, and this is our moment to prove it.
\- Team Sara
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de9/4bef7a87/6834ef1d/287f15de/1575426691/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MjktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august-eom?refcode=em190829-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de9/4bef7a87/6834ef1d/287f15dd/1575426691/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802de9/4bef7a87/6834ef1d/287f15dc/1575426691/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

| Team -- the September debate lineup is set. I'll be on stage with Andrew Yang, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Beto O'Rourke, Julian Castro, and Amy Klobuchar. **[As one of our campaign's top supporters, I want to hear from you. Will you take two minutes to submit your response to my debate prep survey today?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?source=em_su_20190829_CB_20190829-su-CB-debateprep-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks to this grassroots team, I'm one of only ten candidates who met the threshold to be on stage. name: Josh Hawley
subject: That's not transparency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
Facebook needs to submit to a third-party audit by revealing their internal protocols Hello Peter,
As you might have heard, Facebook recently announced an "audit" of their policies, saying they want to gain insight into the plethora of conservative complaints. On the surface, this might seem like a step in the right direction; but the reality is that it was just another PR stunt. I need your help to fight for genuine reform, and I want to explain why. [ DONATE TODAY ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a4be45ed4d174c71b65731028f235398&_e=ugJqQQBDUEpgK5wzkf0SDkhzChPZ6hwRZMiKAXt8-3dzu0VOR0aEPfjYYUvSQW-W1A8R4g2LEiNObc2CbQOVFGCBUDIvVj8HVHUY4ojEarZg3m99am-gEj0HQRmHRxioxiyr6n_2A11ZSnEf2LIurH05tUAfrsb_RT-ykI7_drfGyW5nMvFQrYVGfFg0MwfRBCoPZoyr-AFQD0MuPkE6vf59q_rzoezpjPoo_QPtgpCWJRpHlkZmyJCzCHB0agrcknfZE_g9OxGlLb5ZbHEVifS8wRPDhpP8wI-kPwQzUeMWqchV88hHeyHQHKmE-WC8hFA1s5OkXcsEtPZafRDiFOknuAcW_HlFTJWS-z9Giy6eQ_y0pl7AQWByrlQocichd7hbTMHPtaT5dqmyD1DLkycaMEal9w6ylyjuCXccsWE%3D) Facebook needs to submit to a third-party audit by revealing their internal protocols. That would be an actual audit and not just lip service.

We've watched Big Tech companies make promise after promise to improve their policies with zero results. I'm doing all I can to hold them accountable. Thank you for standing with me.

name: Khizr Khan
subject: RE: insulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked already.

But it's so critical that I'm asking again.

Donald Trump insulted my son -- who gave his life to this country.

He attacked my wife and me -- after we honored him at the Democratic Convention.

**I 'd walk over hot coals to stop Trump -- but I can't do this alone.**

I'm doing everything possible to take away his Republican Senate. We'll lose unless we can keep New Mexico blue -- and that's why I'm asking. Ben Ray has $2,548 to raise and only 48 hours to fill the gap before his critical end-of-month deadline. name: Jim Hilk
subject: Threatening Our Way of Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Threatening Our Way of Life How does this sound? $527 billion for “free,
universal school meals,” as well as to expand food stamps. $407 billion to “
Threatening Our Way of Life

How does this sound?
* $527 billion for “free, universal school meals,” as well as to expand food
stamps.
* $407 billion to “replace all school and transit buses with electric buses.”
* $36 billion to help “transform their lawns into food-producing or
reforested spaces.”
* Prosecuting oil and gas executives on “criminal activity” for simply doing
their jobs.
* Utilizing the EPA to impose “sanctions on corporations and entities that
threaten national and global emissions reduction goals."
* A “wholesale transformation of our society” for environmental purposes.
Well, that’s exactly what Bernie Sanders, Lizzie Fletcher and the modern
Democratic Party stands for.

Last week, Senator Sanders released his Green New Deal proposal, which
promises radical change to every aspect of life for Houstonians. It promises
to force millions out of work in the oil and gas industry. It promises to
spend your hard earned tax money on wild expenses that will almost certainly
bankrupt the entire American government. It promises to prosecute businessmen
in the 7th District, just for doing their jobs, which are well within the
bounds of the law.

Bernie Sanders is a threat to everything we hold dear. And what’s Lizzie
Fletcher doing to stop him? Absolutely nothing.

Despite this insanity, like every other leftwing proposal coming from
Sanders, Pelosi and AOC, Lizzie Fletcher responds with silence. She wants to
continue falsely claiming she’s a moderate while refusing to stand up to the
radical left.

Wesley Hunt won’t be afraid to publicly decry anyone, Republican or Democrat
who threatens our way of life. He won’t be beholden to extremists. He’ll be a
voice for the 7th District and our way of life.

Sincerely,
Jim Hilk
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Closing out a difficult month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
No one can stand on the sidelines in this democracy, least of all those who've seen the consequences of Trump’s rhetoric up close. That’s why everyone being in and everyone giving this 110% is so important.
#
This has been a difficult, emotional month. What happened in El Paso lit a new fire under us. It showed our entire campaign how consequential this fight is. President Trump's racism does not just offend our sensibilities; it fundamentally changes the character of this country. And it leads to violence.
So as we close out August, I am more determined than ever to win this race. **What it’s going to take is meeting every single goal from here on out. Falling short, even by a little, is no longer an option.**
Early this month, we took a necessary break from the campaign trail and from our fundraising. But now we need to pick up our pace, and that’s why I have to ask for your help before the August deadline.
[Can I count on you to donate $3 right now? Your gift now will help us close the fundraising gap before our end-of-month deadline.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30348?refcode=ema20190829-51889&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=51889%2E444211%2EdVLRaV)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30348?refcode=ema20190829-51889&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=51889%2E444211%2EdVLRaV)**
No one can stand on the sidelines in this democracy, least of all those who've seen the consequences of Trump’s rhetoric up close. That’s why everyone being in and everyone giving this 110% is so important.
Thanks for being in this with us.
Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=51889%2E444211%2EdVLRaV). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

Our August fundraising goal is midnight Saturday, and we wanted to take a moment to explain why a donation from you right now would make a real difference.

With a climate forum and a debate to kick off next month, it's going to be a busy September for volunteers and organizers all across the country -- and the pace of the race will only get faster as we near the first primaries and caucuses.

**We need resources to power their work in September and beyond -- to host more watch parties, knock more doors, and make sure we're putting bold plans to tackle big issues at the center of this election.**

**And that means reaching our goal by midnight tomorrow.**

**[To make it all happen, we set a goal of getting 10,000 new donors before Saturday 's deadline. Will you chip in for the first time today and become one of the grassroots donors powering our movement?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285292cc/45c30650/124b293ef/66878788/2658683406/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUk4NEZfRU9NX0dPTF9XXzIwMTkwODI5X1YxUzMifQ==/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMI84F_EOM_GOL_W_20190829_V1S3")**

On September 4, CNN is hosting a Climate Crisis Town Hall, where Elizabeth will get to share our vision for tackling climate change. And on September 12, Elizabeth will be on stage in Houston for the third Democratic debate.

On Debate Night, we'll gather for watch parties across the country to get the word out about Elizabeth's vision for big, structural change.

**But it 's not just the headline moments that count. With less than six months to go before the first caucuses and primaries, we'll be using every single day to reach more voters, sign people up to caucus, and keep growing this movement.**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: It's about time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to help out my friend Mark Warner, because he needs our help to win in 2020 and keep Virginia blue.
|
---
| | | **August fundraising goal: 200 new supporters**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e2924/214920956/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")****
---
Derek --

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to help out my friend Mark Warner, because he needs our help to win in 2020 and keep Virginia blue. But I want to talk first about 2019.

From launching canvasses to hosting roundtables, Mark has been working hard to elect Democrats to the General Assembly this November. Mark knows that flipping the General Assembly is an important first step to beating Donald Trump and taking back the Senate in 2020, but while he's out working hard for our Virginia Democrats, we need to make sure his campaign has the resources needed to win his own election.

**Right now Mark is up against an important end-of-month deadline and behind on his monthly grassroots fundraising goal. Will you make a contribution to help Mark reach his 200 new supporter goal before the end of August?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e2923/214920956/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e2922/214920956/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e2921/214920956/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e2920/214920956/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e292f/214920956/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e292e/214920956/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
President Trump has headquartered his 2020 campaign right here in Virginia, ready for a fight. But I'll tell you what, he's going to be sorely disappointed. Because after we flip the General Assembly this year, we're going to go on to elect even more Democrats in 2020 -- and we're going to keep Mark in the Senate fighting for Virginians.

**It 's critical that Mark keeps his Senate seat, not just for Virginians, but for the whole country.** Losing Mark's seat could derail Democrats' strategy to regain control of the U.S. Senate -- something we need to do if we're going to have any shot at passing legislation that will improve health care, reduce gun violence, and keep our elections secure.

I'm working hard to make it happen and so is Mark. But it's going to take every Democrat in Virginia doing their part. **[Will you join our 200 new supporter goal by making your first donation today to keep Mark in the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e292d/214920956/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Tim

_Your supporter record is based on our digital contribution records associated with this email address. If you recently contributed via mail or in another way, thank you so much!_

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e292c/214920956/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augeomnd?refcode=20190829nd__192__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d128/53d9897e/52ecfe0a/1c8e292b/214920956/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

clean_body: Did you see this image on CNN yesterday? | | | | | Friend, did you see this image on CNN yesterday or on Twitter? | | Now you may not realize it from this image, but we were actually ahead of one of the candidates in this poll. In fact -- in several of the polls released this week -- we have been leading more than one of the candidates in this graphic. I’ll admit I’ve never been a politician before, but the treatment of our rising national poll results has been odd and confusing. That said, this tells me one thing -- it’s important for us to send a message before the September debate that our movement is real and growing. And, most importantly, cannot be ignored. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | If we were to beat expectations for August fundraising ahead of the next debate, we would force the networks and everyone in the media to pay attention and increase coverage of our campaign. This would also allow new voters to hear our message and be introduced to me as one of the leading candidates. The trend of this campaign is already very positive -- think where we could be if we received the same level of coverage as folks like Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Joe Biden. We must prove to everyone this is a movement that can’t be ignored. And the power to do that is in your hands now. | Let’s do this Yang Gang! -Andrew Yang | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. | | ****Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump's New Immigration Rules Work for the American People
body:
"While liberals will cry foul,” most Americans are demanding smart, targeted steps toward solving our nation’s immigration crisis." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8f06086d6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump's New Immigration Rules Work for the American People**

“While liberals will cry foul,” most Americans are demanding smart, targeted steps toward solving our nation’s immigration crisis, Tim Chapman writes in _The Hill_.

“Congress has tried and failed for decades to create a comprehensive immigration reform plan,” Chapman says. So “the administration has steadily been chipping away at the system’s problems to make immigration work for our country again.”

Recently, “the White House issued a ‘public charge’ rule change, restricting the ability of non-citizens to apply for a green card if they rely significantly on welfare benefits or are likely to do so. This week, they issued a new regulation to replace the Flores settlement and end family separation” while still enforcing the law at our southern border.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aeda803214&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Ivanka Trump will travel to Argentina in September to focus on issues that make it difficult for women in developing countries to prosper financially, including lack of access to credit and limits on employment,” the [_Buenos Aires Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e5ee3d7fc&e=3ee4985eea) reports. Ms. Trump “plans to also visit Paraguay to promote the Women's Global Development and Prosperity Initiative, a program started six months ago” by Ms. Trump and the White House.
---
|
---
| “I asked Wednesday morning how long it would be before the [MSNBC’s Lawrence O’Donnell] retracted or, at the very least, corrected his bogus Russia ‘scoop’ . . . As it turns out, the answer to that question was about 18 hours,” Becket Adams writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a09b37a75f&e=3ee4985eea). O’Donnell admitted an “error in judgment” in promoting a false story about the President’s finances after NBC received a legal demand for a retraction.
---
|
---
| America can’t control everything that happens in the global economy, but under President Trump, the United States is once again resilient enough to weather pockets of weakness abroad. “The Trump economy is strong. It will be even stronger if Congress, the Fed, the [European Central Bank], Britain, and Germany all implement commonsense policies,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f2564d4289&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=302df82272&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=543124e5f2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=46d92736ef)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team de Blasio
subject: Beating projections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
The one thing I know for sure that CNN's national audience is going to see tonight:
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e76/1630b3eb/5167ac6a/5f54b31d/2888666179/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=713_org_em_fr")
Friend,
Every presidential campaign dreads the end of August. Why? Because it's like trying to rush through Times Square on a crowded summer day -- everything just seems to slow down.
That slowdown really impacts fundraising. We started this campaign late, but we're pushing hard to qualify for the debate in October. That process starts with hitting our monthly goals -- and right now, we're behind.
But it's not too late: just 1,000 more contributions before the month ends on Saturday will help us beat our projections for August. Can you help?
**[Contribute $1 today to help beat our projections for August and get closer to qualifying for the October debate.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e76/1630b3eb/5167ac6a/5f54b31d/2888666179/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=713_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e76/1630b3eb/5167ac6a/5f54b31d/2888666179/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=713_org_em_fr")
Bill is the only candidate in this race with a track record of fighting for and winning real progressive reforms that are making a big difference in the lives of working people, like universal pre-K, health care, a $15 minimum wage, paid sick leave and a Green New Deal.
People all over America are coming together to support this campaign because they have confidence that we can bring those successes to the rest of the country with the right leadership in the White House.
**[Help us reach 1,000 more contributions before midnight Saturday. Contribute $1 now.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e76/1630b3eb/5167ac6a/5f54b31d/2888666179/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=713_org_em_fr")**
If Bill can come out of August as one of the few candidates beating his projections, it could give this campaign the jolt of momentum we need heading into the fall. It won't be easy. But nobody said it would be easy to put working people first either.
Let's get to work,
Team de Blasio

[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21e76/1630b3eb/5167ac6a/5f54b31d/2888666179/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_augeom?refcode=713_org_em_fr")

If I want to have a fighting chance -- and ensure that Republicans finally lose their grip on the Senate -- I need to close this fundraising gap before the End of Month Deadline in 48 hours.

[Please take our quick issues survey before the end of the month.](https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20190829/?source=ema20190829-51946&t=1&akid=51946%2E444211%2EHZT6iU)

name: Dan Baer
subject: RE: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
This morning I read the news: This is the front lines.
|
---

| | I know I emailed earlier.

I'm sorry to email again, but this is important:

[**I need 654 more gifts before my End of Month Deadline in 48 hours, and I 'm hoping you can help. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f9/232dfd1/803569f/62a13715/4093070615/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190829_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

This morning I read the news: Republicans admitted that they're "screwed" if they lose the Senate, and are willing to spend millions to protect their "firewall."

And make no mistake: The first place they're shipping funds is right here to Colorado.

MSNBC, CNN, and even Fox News reported that my race is Democrats' #1 pick-up opportunity.

This is the front lines. And to take on the Republican establishment and their wealthy, special interest billionaires -- I need your help!

Can you help me power this grassroots campaign with a few bucks before the deadline? Gifts like yours truly make the difference for our chance to flip the Senate and oust McConnell!
| | [**Donate $10 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f9/232dfd1/803569f/62a1371a/4093070615/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190829_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=10&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

[**Donate another amount now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f9/232dfd1/803569f/62a1371b/4093070615/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190829_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Thanks again for all the help,

Dan

[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f9/232dfd1/803569f/62a13719/4093070615/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f9/232dfd1/803569f/62a1371e/4093070615/VEsO/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827f9/232dfd1/803569f/62a1371f/4093070615/VEsP/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

August is our first deadline with an opponent in the race, and we're not slowing down. Don't let him and Mitch McConnell out-raise and out-organize us.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190829EOM1-b&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

This is urgent.

name: Super PAC Watch (via Conole HQ)
subject: Fwd: escalating attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | Bumping Francis' note for you. It's critical we fight back against escalating attacks from Republican super PACS -- and we need your help to do that.

[**We still have $7,090 left to raise before midnight on Saturday. Can you make a grassroots contribution now?**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+We+still+have+7090+left+to+raise+before+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")

Thanks!

-- Conole HQ

** _On Wednesday, August 28, 2019, Francis Conole wrote:_**

I have both good and bad news.

**Here is the good news:** Our grassroots mission is gaining momentum throughout NY-24!

**But, here is the bad news:** Because of our growing campaign, GOP super PACs are already targeting us.

Republicans know I have a chance to beat their special interest rubber stamp, Congressman Katko -- so they'll only escalate their attacks in the coming months. We must be prepared to fight back.

[**We need to raise $10,000 for our Fight Back Fund before the end of August so we can be prepared for the GOP 's attacks. Will you chip in right now?**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+raise+10000+for+our+Fight+Bac&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._ | [$5](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+5&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2") | [$20](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+20&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2") | [$50](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=50&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+50&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")
---|---|---
[$100](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=100&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+100&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2") | [$250](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=250&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=7+-+250&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2") | [Other](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=8+-+Other&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")
Unlike Katko and his GOP allies, we're not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. We know they're threatened by our all people, no corporate PACs-mission.

**[So, will you contribute before Saturday's deadline to help us fight the right-wing attacks?](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+FIRSTNAMESo+will+you+contribute+before+S&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")

[https://go.conoleforcongress.com/superpac-attack](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-superpac?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+httpsgoconoleforcongresscomsuperpacattac&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")**

I really appreciate you being a part of our team.

Yours in service,

Francis

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1ff/388db0e9/83a6b03/609ae136/2129910052/VEsHBA/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=11+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1ff/388db0e9/83a6b03/609ae135/2129910052/VEsHBw/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=12+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=13+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")**

We're relying on grassroots supporters like you. But, if you wish to no longer receive emails from us, you can **[unsubscribe here.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1ff/388db0e9/83a6b03/609ae133/2129910052/VEsHAQ/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=14+-+unsubscribe+here&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190829_1_2")** Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

name: Tim
subject: we aren't done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
I am disappointed we won't be on stage for the next debate team, but that doesn't mean we stop fighting.

Every day our campaign is traveling the country, speaking with Americans who share the same basic values: they want good paying jobs, affordable healthcare, and a promising future for our kids.

We have a plan to make those things happen -- and the more people hear that plan -- the larger our campaign grows.

[**Your continued support keeps us on the road. name: Beshear for Kentucky
subject: Enough with the robocalls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We all get them. Never-ending robocalls -- especially at dinner -- are not only annoying, they put Kentuckians more at risk for scams and identity theft.
|
---

| | Peter,

We all get them. Never-ending robocalls -- especially at dinner -- are not only annoying, they put Kentuckians more at risk for scams and identity theft.

That's why as attorney general, Andy joined a bipartisan group of AGs to sign an anti-robocall agreement with many of the biggest phone companies in the country. This agreement will not only mean fewer robocalls -- it will ensure we can catch the people making them in the first place.

Kentuckians deserve a governor who actually looks after their interests instead of doing the bidding of the well-connected special interests and big corporations. Andy has shown that time and time again he is standing up for working families.

**Will you chip in to make sure we have a governor who will fight for us?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557acb/ad6dc73/14d84371/db4488e/2013370974/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-robocalls?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__231__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557acb/ad6dc73/14d84371/db4488f/2013370974/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-robocalls?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__231__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557acb/ad6dc73/14d84371/db4488c/2013370974/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-robocalls?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__231__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557acb/ad6dc73/14d84371/db4488d/2013370974/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-robocalls?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__231__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557acb/ad6dc73/14d84371/db44882/2013370974/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-robocalls?express_lane=true&refcode=20190829nd__231__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557acb/ad6dc73/14d84371/db44883/2013370974/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-robocalls?refcode=20190829nd__231__")** Andy is running against someone who continues to side with the powerful special interests and CEOs. And Bevin is tapping into his own personal fortune to get reelected.

Andy needs your help to win this race. He always has our back. **[Will you get his back by donating $10?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557acb/ad6dc73/14d84371/db44880/2013370974/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-robocalls?refcode=20190829nd__231__&amount=10")**

name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: dangerous times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, over the past few days, one thing has become self-evident:

[**Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are a clear and present danger to our democracy.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac01/134673f2/b8b6fa5/69965341/4247681837/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B2_082919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

**FIRST:** Russia interfered in the 2016 election, eroding our democratic systems.

**THEN:** Mitch McConnell blocked EIGHT pieces of legislation that would protect our elections from foreign interference.

**NOW:** The Federal Election Committee is effectively shutting down because Trump won't nominate commissioners.

[**This is an election emergency, Friends, and we need to take action.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac01/134673f2/b8b6fa5/69965341/4247681837/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B2_082919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael has an aggressive and comprehensive election security plan.

With so much at stake heading into 2020, the American people are looking for a leader with a voice of reason, an unwavering commitment to the truth, and ambitious yet durable solutions.

[**That 's why Michael is running for president. He's seen firsthand the chaos and confusion spawned by Trump and his side-kick in the Senate, Mitch McConnell.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac01/134673f2/b8b6fa5/69965341/4247681837/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B2_082919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

| Friend, **Cory 's numbers doubled in one of the latest national polls.** We're building real grassroots momentum in this race -- **and now we have to capitalize on it.** If the debates showed us one thing, it's that the more people find out about Cory Booker, the more people like him. That's why we recently launched an online advertising campaign to get our message out to as many Americans as possible. **[Can you chip in today so that we can keep our ads live and make sure Cory's message reaches every voter?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?refcode=em_fr_20190829_BHQ_20190829-fr-BHQ-ads-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Here's one that's live right now: [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?refcode=em_fr_20190829_BHQ_20190829-fr-BHQ-ads-actives_actives_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **But we're not quite where we need to be for our August fundraising, which could mean cutting back on our ad budget before the debate stage.[Can you chip in today?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?refcode=em_fr_20190829_BHQ_20190829-fr-BHQ-ads-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-august?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190829_BHQ_20190829-fr-BHQ-ads-actives_actives_express5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: SENATE ALERT (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: Fox News just admitted:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Speaker Pelosi asked.
Ben Ray Lujan asked.
Khizr Khan asked.
James Carville asked.
Paul Begala asked.

That's how absolutely unprecedented this is.

\- Mitch McConnell is now in danger of losing his seat
\- Democrats have completely erased his lead in the polls
\- And Fox News just admitted his favorability is the worst in the entire Senate

One thing has never been more certain:
**
This is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to finally remove McConnell from office -- _and take back the entire Senate._**

But Democrats' chances drop to zero if we lose Ben Ray's Senate race in New Mexico. That's why meeting his end-of-month goal is so downright critical.

He's 853 gifts short. Will you help before the 48-hour deadline? | | **[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ca/18e32a7f/521cc028/7bd5185e/594880654/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190829_em_fr_b3_sav_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ca/18e32a7f/521cc028/7bd51856/594880654/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ca/18e32a7f/521cc028/7bd51857/594880654/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Put an end to Mitch McConnell's obstruction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
[**I 'm doing everything I can to take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the GOP. Can you show your support and contribute $5 to my end-of-month fundraising goal?**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-august-2019?refcode=em190829&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Peter,
Everything is on the line in 2020. Even if Democrats win the White House, we won't be able to make progress for the American people until we take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell.
There is no excuse for the Majority Leader's inaction. From failing to enact commonsense gun safety legislation to refusing to protect our elections from foreign interference, Mitch McConnell is choosing time and time again to obstruct all progress in the name of his partisan agenda.
[**We can take back the Senate, but we must defend every Democratic seat, including here in Illinois. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 now toward my end-of-month goal?**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-august-2019?refcode=em190829&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
With a Democratic Senate, alongside a Democratic House and President, we can begin to undo the damage caused by President Trump and move our country in the right direction again. We can take action on climate change, reduce the cost of health care, and defend our democracy.
But our only hope of accomplishing anything in the Senate is by ensuring Mitch McConnell is no longer the Majority Leader after 2020. And we have a crucial part to play right here in Illinois.
[**Help us take back the Senate. Pitch in $5 to help me meet my end-of-month goal.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-august-2019?refcode=em190829&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-august-2019?refcode=em190829&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cc1/42ab3cf4/617f6ec8/135d7d40/2756666469/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cc1/42ab3cf4/617f6ec8/135d7d41/2756666469/VEsA/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

Chicago, IL 60654

name: primary@weld2020.org
subject: Trump is attacking us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPgiSawJ3EG19H9sXkkqPI&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190829_fr_eom&n=1) Friend — once again Donald Trump is showing _**he’s afraid of our movement**_. Earlier this week he went on another one of his unhinged Twitter rants about his challengers. Here’s what he said: [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPgiSawJ3EG19H9sXkkqPI&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190829_fr_eom&n=2) Talk about a typical Trump cheap shot. Seems like he’s referring to the time, _more than 20 years ago_ , when Governor Weld fell ill with the flu while receiving an Honorary Degree at a prestigious college. Cheap shot aside, if you dig a little deeper it's clear these tweets mean we’re getting under his skin. It means we have to keep the momentum going.**It means we’ve got a shot to beat him.** **But we can’t do it alone — we’re relying on supporters like you to help carry us through this campaign.** We don’t have the luxury of Donald Trump’s loose morals, wealthy friends, and cabal of cronies willing to go along with just about any corrupt deal in exchange for campaign donations. We’re looking to raise another **$12,553** from supporters like you by **midnight Saturday** if we want to hit our critical end-of-month fundraising goal and continue to build on the momentum we’ve established in New Hampshire, Iowa, and around the country. If we don’t hit this goal, we risk losing ground, and **having to put off hiring more staff that will help us reach out to voters in critical early primary states.** [**Can you be one of the first ten donors to help us reach our critical end-of-month goal by donating $10, $20, or whatever you can today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPgiSawJ3EG19H9sXkkqPI&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190829_fr_eom&n=3) Thanks for helping us get there,
Team Weld | | [HELP US HIRE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARzPgiSawJ3EG19H9sXkkqPI&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190829_fr_eom&n=4)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190829_fr_eom&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190829_fr_eom&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190829_fr_eom&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190829_fr_eom&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Team Beto
subject: Just 2 people in 34223 would get us there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
There are only a couple of days left before we close the books on our August fundraising. Meeting our budget goal is absolutely critical — we can’t fall short.
#
There are only a couple of days left before we close the books on our August fundraising. Meeting our budget goal is absolutely critical — we can’t fall short.
**Our average contribution recently is $26.01.** So we need about 9,031 contributions to hit the right amount of money to meet our budget. Is that doable in the time we’ve got? We’re honestly not sure, but we have to try.
Based on the number of Beto supporters in the 34223 zip code, we just need 2 people in your nearby area to donate. [Can you be one of those today? If everyone gives just a little bit, we’ll reach 9,031 in no time.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30376?refcode=ema20190829-51986&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=51986%2E444211%2EHw642s)
**[Give $3 now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/30376?refcode=ema20190829-51986&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=51986%2E444211%2EHw642s)**
We’re writing now because these emails bring in most of our contributions. Other candidates focus on big events or dialing for dollars, but emails are truly the lifeblood of Beto’s campaign. Let us know if you’ll be able to chip in today.
\- Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=51986%2E444211%2EHw642s). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: info@protectvoting.org
subject: [deadline approaching] let's unseat Susan Collins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Susan Collins's vote for Kavanaugh was all the proof we needed that she doesn't care about supporting other women and is always willing to do the bidding of Donald Trump. It's clear that she has no place in the Senate.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Susan Collins's vote for Kavanaugh was all the proof we needed that she doesn't care about supporting other women and is **always** willing to do the bidding of Donald Trump. It's clear that she has no place in the Senate. But we'll need to support a strong, experienced Democrat in 2020 if we're going to unseat Collins -- which is why we're supporting Democrat Sara Gideon for Senate: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06e8/72412298/4035484f/610296ef/3844320450/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDgyOV9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDIiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190829_SusanCollins_U1_X2&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190829_SusanCollins_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190829_SusanCollins_U1_X2") **Sara has a clear mandate from Maine: nearly half of her donors so far have been in-state, compared to just 5% of Collins 's.** **_But Collins has raised more money after voting to confirm Kavanaugh than at any other time in her Senate career_****** from right-wing forces determined to keep the Senate in GOP hands and implement their extremist agenda -- which involves taking healthcare from millions of Americans and stripping women of their reproductive rights. 314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4715/4bd7760e/405a132b/77e19268/2436526682/VEsEAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=24+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190829_CongChallenger_U1_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190829_CongChallenger_U1_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4715/4bd7760e/405a132b/77e19277/2436526682/VEsEAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=25+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190829_CongChallenger_U1_X2&source=314_EM_FR_190829_CongChallenger_U1_X2")
